tools_called.name: read_section
tools_called.result_content: {"section_id": "doc2:0", "title": "Privacy Risks of Health AI", "full_text": "AI systems processing patient data face risks including re-identification of anonymized records, model memorization of training data, and unauthorized access through adversarial attacks. GDPR Article 22 restricts automated decision-making in healthcare contexts.", "source": "EU Health Data Space Whitepaper 2025"}

tools_called.name: read_section
tools_called.result_content: {"section_id": "doc3:0", "title": "Regulatory Landscape \u2014 EU AI Act", "full_text": "The EU AI Act classifies medical AI systems as high-risk, requiring conformity assessments, human oversight, and transparency documentation. Providers must establish risk management systems and maintain technical documentation throughout the AI system's lifecycle.", "source": "EU AI Act Implementation Guide 2025"}
